The Agent Command Center Command Center Launchpad
Premium Demo Simulator Registry Scale Safety Review Legacy Dashboard Archive

Public stakeholder demo

Command Center Launchpad

The Agent Command Center is a static, read-only demonstration of a large-scale AI operations control system. It organizes 47,979 registered agents across 1,777 departments, with safety gates, simulator flows, and audit-ready review materials.

This public demo does not run live agents. Live runtime agents enabled: 0. Runtime activation has not started. Backend/Supabase readiness exists. Live backend runtime disabled. MVP-51 not started. Live backend writes, public mutations, command execution, deployment actions, rollback execution, and automation are disabled.

MVP-50 Production Verified Static Read-Only Demo Backend/Supabase Readiness Exists Live Runtime Disabled Live Runtime Agents: 0 Runtime Activation Not Started

Exact registry snapshot

Exact scale summary

  • Exact agent count: 47,979
  • Exact department count: 1,777
  • Exact unit count: 5,331
  • Exact family count: 175
  • Hierarchy levels: 7
  • Operational domains: 11
  • Source: org_chart_export.json
  • Live runtime agents enabled: 0
  • Runtime activation: not started

Launchpad

What to open first

A clean first-time visitor route through the stakeholder demo without any live automation or public writes.

Premium Stakeholder Demo

Open the premium stakeholder demo hub with the guided browser-ready overview.

Open Premium Demo Hub

Runnable Static Simulator

Open the safe, static command-flow simulator at ./demo/simulator.html.

Open Simulator

View the exact registry with declared counts, hierarchy levels, and operational domains.

View Exact Registry

Inspect the exact counts and source file behind the public scale summary.

View System Scale

Review the disabled runtime surface and the safety posture before any future activation discussion.

View Safety Posture

Open the decision page for the stakeholder demo and review readiness.

View Review Materials

Open the preserved internal audit dashboard archive for provenance and deep review.

Open Full Audit Dashboard

Inspect the implementation notes, validator strategy, and proof surfaces.

View Technical Appendix

Current Status / Readiness Overview

Legacy verification phrases preserved alongside the cleaned launchpad

Latest Verified MVP

MVP-50 Production Verified.

Backend/Supabase readiness architecture exists

Live backend runtime is disabled.

Open Static Simulator

Use the static simulator path from the launchpad.

Open Full Audit / Archive

Original Full Audit Dashboard remains preserved under the archive route.

System at a Glance

Where the registry, simulator, and review flow fit together

These visuals are static and text-based, but they make the architecture easier to scan on desktop and mobile.

  2. Departments

  5. Approval

  7. Queue
  8. Human Review
  9. Monitoring Readiness

Registered vs Runtime

  • Registered agents: 47,979
  • Live runtime agents: 0
  • Activation: not started
  • Meaning: the registry exists; automation remains disabled.

11 Operational Domains

Demo-facing operating domain map

Source type: demo-facing operating domain map derived from MVP-43 through MVP-50 readiness architecture.

  • Authentication / identity readiness
  • Request storage readiness
  • Audit ledger readiness
  • Approval gate readiness
  • Dry-run readiness
  • Controlled action queue readiness
  • Human-approved execution readiness
  • Monitoring / rollback / incident readiness
  • Demo / stakeholder review readiness
  • Validator / quality gate readiness
  • Safety boundary readiness

What this is / what this is not

Plain-English boundary setting

What this is

  • A stakeholder-facing static demo.
  • A command-center architecture presentation.
  • A registry and safety-boundary preview.
  • A simulator for safe request flow demonstration.
  • A proof of dashboard, validator, deployment, and systems design capability.

What this is not

  • Not a live automation runtime.
  • Not running 47,979 live autonomous agents.
  • Not executing commands.
  • Not writing to Supabase.
  • Not deploying, merging, pushing, rolling back, or sending alerts.
  • Not MVP-51.

For Recruiters / Hiring Managers

Why this matters

Skills demonstrated

  • AI-assisted software development
  • System architecture
  • Static deployment
  • Validator-driven QA
  • Safety and runtime-boundary design
  • Data registry generation
  • UX / product demo packaging
  • Deployment debugging
  • Technical communication

Why this matters

  • The value is not that 47,979 agents are running today.
  • The value is that the command structure, safety model, registry, simulator, and review process are visible before runtime activation.
  • MVP-50 Production Verified is the current verified demo milestone.
  • The next runtime phase has not started.

Glossary

Translate the demo terms into plain English

Registered agent

A registered command-center operating unit listed in the static org-chart registry.

Live runtime agent

A live autonomous process. The count is 0 in this build.

Runtime activation

Turning on live execution. It has not started.

Static simulator

A browser-only in-memory demo that does not call backends or execute actions.

Backend/Supabase readiness

The architecture is prepared, but live writes and public mutation remain disabled.

Validator

A script that checks files, markers, and safety conditions.

Safety gate

A hard stop that prevents unsafe movement into runtime or mutation flows.

MVP-50

The current verified demo milestone, summarized here as MVP-50 Production Verified.

5-minute demo path

Recommended stakeholder walk-through

  1. Start here: Command Center Launchpad
  2. Open Premium Demo Hub
  3. Run the Static Simulator
  4. Review System Scale
  5. Open Agent Registry
  6. Review Safety Boundaries
  7. Open Review / Scorecard
Public root is the stakeholder launchpad. The archived internal dashboard remains available under /dashboard.html, /full-audit-dashboard.html, and /internal/full-audit-dashboard.html.
